data.name: Section1Intro
data.value: In compliance with Article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002 of 11 July on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI), the following identification details are provided:

data.name: ActivityValue
data.value: Development, publication and operation of software, web applications and digital services, as well as software libraries and components distributed as open source or as licensed packages

data.name: Section2Text
data.value: This Legal Notice governs access to and use of the websites, applications and digital services owned by Sergi Ortiz Gómez. The owner's activity comprises the development, publication and operation of various software products and services, including, by way of example and without limitation: online platforms and services — such as automated cryptocurrency trading software, electronic invoicing services compliant with applicable regulations (for example, VeriFactu), quality management solutions based on the ISO 9001 standard, and personal content organisation applications — as well as software libraries, components and tools distributed as open source or as packages (for example, NuGet packages), whether free of charge or subject to a licence. Each product or service may have its own particular terms of use, end-user licence agreement (EULA) and privacy policy, which shall prevail over this Legal Notice to the extent specifically applicable. The services provided do not constitute professional, financial, investment or legal advice unless expressly stated otherwise.

data.name: Section3Text
data.value: Unless otherwise stated, all contents of the owner's websites and services — including texts, designs, source code, logos, trademarks and images — are owned by Sergi Ortiz Gómez or are duly licensed for use, and are protected by Spanish and European Union intellectual and industrial property law. Their reproduction, distribution, transformation or public communication without the express written authorisation of the owner is prohibited. However, software distributed as open source or through packages (for example, NuGet packages) is governed by the terms of its respective licence (such as MIT, or any other licence or EULA accompanying each product), which shall prevail with respect to that software.

data.name: Section4Title
data.value: 4. Terms of Use and Limitation of Liability

data.name: Section4Text
data.value: The user undertakes to use the owner's websites, applications and services in accordance with the law, this Legal Notice and, where applicable, the particular terms of each product. The software and services are provided "as is" and "as available", without any warranty of uninterrupted or error-free operation. The owner shall not be liable for any damages arising from improper use, incorrect configuration by the user, failures or interruptions of third-party services or platforms, loss of data, or any other circumstance beyond its reasonable control. In particular, the automated trading software operates according to the parameters configured by the user and does not guarantee any profitability or outcome, and in no case constitutes financial or investment advice. The foregoing limitations shall apply to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, without affecting the rights granted to users who qualify as consumers under consumer protection legislation.

data.name: Section5Text
data.value: This Legal Notice is governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of any dispute arising from access to or use of the owner's websites and services, the parties submit to the Courts and Tribunals that are competent under the law. Where the user qualifies as a consumer, the court of the user's place of residence shall have jurisdiction. In dealings with users acting as professionals or businesses, both parties submit, expressly waiving any other jurisdiction, to the Courts and Tribunals of Las Palmas de Gran Canaria (Spain).
